CatalogItem.description: A catalog entry from items.json. The source of truth for all item data.

id.description: Unique catalog identifier. Pattern: name-based ("sending-stones") or name-number ("leather-1")

image.description: Image key. Never rendered in current UI.

description.description: Full item description. Used for display AND bonus regex parsing.

category.description: Category for filtering and equipment classification. Values: Armor, Weapon, Adventuring Gear, Tools, Poisons, Wondrous Items, Ring, Wand, Staff, Rod, Potions & Oils, Elixir, Scroll, Food & Drink, Mount, Musical Instrument, Tack

rarity.description: Rarity tier. Values: Mundane, Common, Uncommon, Rare, Very Rare, Legendary, Artifact

classification.description: Sub-category. E.g., Light Armor, Medium Armor, Heavy Armor, Simple Melee Weapon, Martial Melee Weapons, etc.

ac.description: Armor class string. E.g., "11 + Dex", "12 + Dex"

properties.description: Pipe-separated weapon properties. E.g., "finesse | light | thrown (range 20/60)". Parsed by regex at runtime.

cost.description: Cost in copper pieces as a string. E.g., "1000" = 10 gp. Non-numeric strings displayed as-is.

InventoryItem.description: An item in a character's inventory. May be catalog-backed or manually created.

id.description: UUID (from crypto.randomUUID()). The primary key for inventory references.

notes.description: Display notes. For catalog items, generated from meta parts.

weight.description: Weight in pounds. Only populated for manually-added items and static armor/weapons.

Equipment.description: A character's equipped items. References either legacy static IDs or inventory UUIDs.

armorItemId.description: UUID of inventory item serving as equipped armor

shieldItemId.description: UUID of inventory item serving as equipped shield

weaponItemIds.description: UUIDs of inventory items serving as equipped weapons

bonusItemIds.description: UUIDs of inventory items providing passive bonuses

ArmorDef.description: Static armor definition in equipment.ts. NOT a catalog item.

WeaponDef.description: Static weapon definition in equipment.ts. NOT a catalog item.
